members.snippet: 【埼玉県気象解説情報（大雨・落雷・降ひょう）】南部と北部では、１６日夕方から夜遅くにかけて、低い土地の浸水や河川の増水に注意・警戒し、土砂災害に注意してください。また、埼玉県では落雷や突風、降ひょうに注意してください。

members.snippet: The case has gripped Nigeria since President Bola Tinubu ordered a corruption investigation last week.

events.headline: China detains US scientist who studied North Korea nuclear tests

members.title: China detains US scientist who studied North Korea nuclear tests
members.snippet: Chen Youlin's family says he has been wrongfully detained for nearly two years on spying charges.

events.headline: Crowds cross between Spain and Gibraltar following UK-EU treaty

members.title: Crowds cross between Spain and Gibraltar following UK-EU treaty
members.snippet: A large crowd crossed between Spain and Gibraltar in the early hours of Wednesday morning, celebrating the UK-EU treaty.

events.headline: ‘A role model’: Djed Spence, first Muslim England player, lifts hopes

members.title: ‘A role model’: Djed Spence, first Muslim England player, lifts hopes
members.snippet: Britain swells with pride over the 25-year-old, the first Muslim to wear the England jersey at a FIFA World Cup.

events.headline: Bangkok pub fire toll rises to 32 with 15 in intensive care

members.title: Bangkok pub fire toll rises to 32 with 15 in intensive care
members.snippet: Officials confirm two more deaths as 30 people remain in hospital, including 15 in intensive care units.

events.headline: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani and Al Jazeera

members.title: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani and Al Jazeera
members.snippet: A tribute to the late Father Emir from Al Jazeera's Chairman of Board of Directors Sheikh Hamad bin Thamer Al Thani
